_comment: Seed data for the reservations MOCK backend (dummy data lives in a JSON file). Edit freely. Keys under 'restaurants' are restaurant_id values, UPPERCASED (they match the resolved credential). Each slot has a date (YYYY-MM-DD), time (HH:MM, 24h, restaurant-local), and capacity; a booking consumes one unit, so availability reflects bookings and the availability!=booked race can be exercised naturally (see the capacity-1 slot). Switchboard itself stays stateless — this is the MOCK standing in for OpenTable's state, and it resets to this seed on restart.
